HomePage.heroTitle: Path of Exile 2 services — bought safely

HomePage.howSubtitle: Your payment is held safely until you confirm the work is done.

HomePage.featuredEmpty: Fresh listings are on the way.
HomePage.sellerBandTitle: Turn your PoE2 mastery into income
HomePage.sellerBandSubtitle: List your services and get paid safely through escrow.
HomePage.guardSubtitle: Every order is protected end to end.
HomePage.guardEscrowDesc: Your payment is held safely and only released when you confirm the work is done.
HomePage.guardMoneyDesc: Not delivered as described? Get a full refund through our dispute process.
HomePage.guardVerifiedDesc: Every seller passes ID verification before they can take orders.
HomePage.guardSecureDesc: No bots, no cheats — party-play and trade methods that respect the game.
HomePage.faqQ1: Is it safe to buy here?
HomePage.faqA1: Yes. Payments are held in escrow and only released to the seller after you confirm delivery — or automatically after 72 hours if you're happy. Sellers are ID-verified.
HomePage.faqA2: Most currency and item orders arrive within 15–60 minutes. Boss carries and leveling show an estimated time on each listing.
HomePage.faqA3: Open a dispute from your order. Our moderators review it and issue a refund or release funds fairly.
HomePage.faqA4: No. We use party-play, in-game trade and coaching — no account sharing required.
HomePage.faqA5: PC, PlayStation 5 and Xbox. Each listing shows the platform it's for.
HomePage.leagueBody: From fresh-start currency to pinnacle boss carries, our sellers cover the current Path of Exile 2 league end to end — Atlas progression, Trials of Ascendancy, crafting and more.
HomePage.expertText: Tell us your goal and we'll point you to the fastest, safest route — tailored to your build and schedule.
HomePage.hotSubtitle: The best deals on right now.
HomePage.sellersTitle: Trusted by players, verified by us
HomePage.sellersSubtitle: Every seller is ID-verified and rated by real buyers.
HomePage.coverTitle: Services for every part of PoE2
HomePage.coverSubtitle: From fresh-start currency to pinnacle boss carries — pick what you need.

Delivery.title: How your order is delivered
Delivery.subtitle: Pick the method that fits the service — your account stays yours, no sharing.
Delivery.partyPlayDesc: The booster joins your party and plays alongside you — your account stays in your hands.
Delivery.tradeDesc: Currency and items are handed over through a normal in-game trade, usually within minutes.
Delivery.sessionDesc: A live 1-on-1 call for builds, mechanics and the economy — you keep playing your way.

Guarantees.title: Every order is protected
Guarantees.subtitle: Escrow, refunds, verified sellers and fair disputes — the safety that earns our 15% fee.
Guarantees.escrowDesc: Your payment is held safely and only released to the seller once you confirm the work is done.
Guarantees.moneyBackDesc: If an order isn't delivered as described, you get a full refund through our dispute process.
Guarantees.verifiedDesc: Every seller passes ID verification and builds a public rating before they can take your order.
Guarantees.disputeDesc: Stuck? Open a dispute — our moderators review the evidence and decide fairly: refund or release.
Guarantees.pageIntro: Buying game services should feel as safe as any online store. Here's exactly how we protect every order.

Categories.currency: Divine, Exalted and Chaos orbs delivered by in-game trade — stock up without the grind.
Categories.items: Build-enabling uniques and crafted gear, handed over safely through trade.
Categories.leveling: Campaign and level boosts — skip the slog and jump straight to maps and endgame.
Categories.carries: Pinnacle and boss carries by experienced players — party-play and account-safe.
Categories.atlas: Atlas progression, Waystone farming and map clears to open up your endgame.
Categories.challenges: League challenge and Ascendancy trial completions for the rewards you want.
Categories.crafting: Custom crafting to spec — tell a crafter your target and get the item built.
Categories.coaching: 1-on-1 coaching on builds, mechanics and economy from players who know the meta.
